headline: Boyd Gaming Has 17.2% Upside: Here’s Why You Should Buy It Before July 23
summary: Boyd Gaming's July 23 earnings report is two weeks out, and a quiet combination of balance sheet strength, aggressive buybacks, and a compressed valuation has set up a trade that most investors are overlooking.

headline: Longleaf Partners Global Fund Q2 2026 Portfolio Review
summary: Global food delivery platform Delivery Hero was a contributor for the quarter. French pay-TV operator Canal+ contributed positively in the quarter.
